title: Verify User Invite Zapier Webhook in Production
description: Verify that the user invitation Zapier webhook (event 0006) is firing correctly in production. No invitations had been triggered recently and it was unclear whether this was due to no users being invited or a webhook configuration issue. Testing confirmed the webhook fires correctly and data reaches Zapier/CRM.
acceptance_criteria: User invitation Zapier webhook fires on production when a user is invited
Webhook data reaches the Zapier endpoint successfully
CRM receives the invite event data
implementation_notes: Testing confirmed the webhook was working correctly — no invitations had been sent in production, which explained the lack of Zap triggers.
comment_summary: Developer sent a test invitation and confirmed the Zap fired. Product confirmed it worked and discussed future enhancements to encourage user invitations.
